seo.title: Luma Uni-1 Max: Pricing, 2K Images and Editing | MaxVideoAI
seo.description: Use Luma Uni-1 Max in MaxVideoAI for premium 2K stills, product visuals, typography-sensitive layouts, source-image edits and reference-led image workflows.

overview: Luma Uni-1 Max is the higher-fidelity Uni image route in MaxVideoAI for selected stills that need stronger product detail, careful revisions, typography-sensitive layouts and reference-led creative direction.
pricingNotes: Display prices use MaxVideoAI pricing. Uni-1 Max is not presented as cheaper or faster than Uni-1; choose it when the still needs the higher-fidelity route.

hero.title: Luma Uni-1 Max - premium 2K image generation and edits
hero.intro: Create hero stills, product images, poster concepts and careful source-image revisions with a higher-fidelity Uni route.

items.title: Hero stills for product and campaign pages

technicalOverview.label: References
technicalOverview.body: Text requests can use multiple references; edits use a source image plus optional references

technicalOverview.label: Style
technicalOverview.body: Auto and manga style controls where exposed

technicalOverview.label: Output format
technicalOverview.body: PNG or JPEG in the active image workspace

technicalOverview.label: Pricing
technicalOverview.body: Public examples use MaxVideoAI display pricing

promptStructure.title: Prompt mini-guide
promptStructure.quote: Hero asset + product or subject + exact layout intent + references + what must stay fixed.
promptStructure.description: Uni-1 Max works best when the brief is already selective. Use it after the creative direction is clear, then ask for a precise still or edit rather than a broad exploration.
steps: Name the target deliverable: hero still, product image, poster or label layout.
Describe product geometry, materials, lighting and composition.
For typography, write exact text and placement, then inspect the output.
For edits, name what stays unchanged before the requested revision.
Use references only when each one has a clear role.
Check the live price before generating.

tips.title: Tips and limits
items: Use Uni-1 Max for selected stills, not every exploratory draft.
Do not assume it is always faster or cheaper than Uni-1.
Use explicit preserve instructions for product and label edits.
Inspect typography, logos and small details before publishing.
Use the app quote as the customer-facing price.

prompts.title: Hero product still
prompts.prompt: Premium 2K hero still of a ceramic skincare bottle on pale stone, crisp label hierarchy, soft studio reflections, controlled shadow, campaign landing page composition, 4:3.

prompts.title: Poster layout
prompts.prompt: Minimal event poster concept with the exact headline "NIGHT GARDEN", large elegant typography, dark botanical texture, centered venue block, premium editorial spacing.

prompts.title: High-detail edit
prompts.prompt: Preserve the uploaded product geometry and label order, improve material realism, clean the background, sharpen edge detail, keep natural highlights.

prompts.title: Creative direction with references
prompts.prompt: Use reference 1 for product identity, reference 2 for surface material, and reference 3 for campaign mood. Create a polished 2K launch still with clear headline space.

faqs.q: What is Luma Uni-1 Max best for?
faqs.a: Use Uni-1 Max for higher-fidelity stills, product visuals, typography-sensitive layouts and careful source-image edits.

faqs.q: Is Uni-1 Max always faster or cheaper than Uni-1?
faqs.a: No. Public copy should not claim that. Use the app quote and choose Max when fidelity matters more than exploration cost.

faqs.q: Can Uni-1 Max edit images with references?
faqs.a: Yes. The edit route uses a source image plus optional references to guide product, style, layout or material changes.

faqs.q: How is Uni-1 Max pricing shown?
faqs.a: Displayed examples use MaxVideoAI pricing with margin. The exact app quote appears before generation.

custom.heroSupportLine: Best for premium 2K hero stills, product visuals and careful reference edits.
custom.heroDesc1: Uni-1 Max gives selected still-image work a higher-fidelity Luma route without implying it should replace every cheaper exploration pass.
custom.heroDesc2: Use it when product detail, careful revisions, typography-sensitive layout or a campaign hero still is the main job.
heroHighlights: Higher-fidelity still route||Use Max when the selected image needs more detail and finish.
Product and typography focus||Describe labels, hierarchy and surfaces explicitly, then inspect the result.
Reference-led edits||Use a source image plus purposeful references for controlled revisions.
Pricing context||Display prices use MaxVideoAI pricing and the app confirms the exact quote.
custom.specNote: Specs describe the public MaxVideoAI image workspace route.

specSections.title: Image workflows
items: Optional references for product, style, palette or layout.

specSections.title: Pricing behavior
items: Base image and reference costs follow MaxVideoAI display pricing.
MaxVideoAI display margin is included in public examples.
The exact app quote is authoritative before generation.
Max is a higher-fidelity route, not a lower-price promise.

custom.whatIntro1: Choose Uni-1 Max in the image workspace when the still already has a clear production goal.
custom.whatIntro2: Use source and reference images to narrow the revision instead of widening the brief.
whatFlowSteps: Choose Luma Uni-1 Max in the image workspace.
Write the hero still or edit brief.
Add only references with explicit roles.
Inspect typography, logos and edge detail.
strengths: Good for selected 2K hero stills and product visuals.
Useful when references need to guide precise revisions.
Stronger fit for polished layouts than early random exploration.
boundaries: Not positioned as always cheaper or faster than Uni-1.
Exact typography and labels need review.
Public pricing follows MaxVideoAI display pricing.
safetyRules: No sexual content or content involving minors.
No hateful, harassing or graphic-violence requests.
Do not impersonate real people or public figures without consent.
Do not include private personal data or sensitive documents.

relatedItems.title: Luma Uni-1

relatedItems.title: Luma Ray 3.2

custom.finalPara1: Luma Uni-1 Max is the premium Uni still-image route for hero images, product visuals and careful source-image edits in MaxVideoAI.

hero.paragraph: Use Uni-1 Max when the still needs more careful detail than the base route: hero images, product-label layouts, typography-sensitive concepts and high-detail edits with references.

features.title: Premium 2K route
features.body: Use Max for selected stills that need stronger detail and finish.

features.title: Product visuals
features.body: Good fit for catalog-style stills, labels, packaging and campaign layouts.

features.title: Precise revisions
features.body: Use source images and references to narrow what should change.

features.title: Typography-sensitive
features.body: Helpful for text-aware layouts, while exact copy still needs inspection.

features.title: Reference direction
features.body: Blend product, style, wardrobe or layout references into one still brief.

features.title: Display pricing
features.body: Display prices use MaxVideoAI pricing before generation.

decisionCards.title: Max or base Uni-1?
decisionCards.body: Use base Uni-1 for exploration. Use Max for selected hero stills, product detail and revisions that justify the higher-cost route.

decisionCards.title: Product or typography hero still?
decisionCards.body: Name exact label hierarchy, surface materials, lighting and composition; then inspect text and edges before shipping.

decisionCards.title: Edit with references
decisionCards.body: Use the source image for what must remain, then add references only when each one has a clear role.

referenceWorkflows.title: Hero still
referenceWorkflows.body: Define product, scene, layout, copy placement, lighting and output ratio before generating.

referenceWorkflows.title: Product label or poster
referenceWorkflows.body: Write text hierarchy explicitly, then verify lettering, logo placement and fine details.

referenceWorkflows.title: High-detail edit
referenceWorkflows.body: Upload the source image and describe the smallest set of changes needed.

referenceWorkflows.title: Multi-reference creative direction
referenceWorkflows.body: Assign references to product identity, palette, material, style or composition.

referenceWorkflows.title: Handoff to video
referenceWorkflows.body: Use the strongest still as a start image when the campaign later needs motion.

pricingCopy.title: Luma Uni-1 Max pricing at a glance
pricingCopy.subtitle: Display prices use MaxVideoAI pricing; exact price appears before generation.
pricingCopy.footnote: Max is not positioned as cheaper or faster than Uni-1; choose it when the still needs the higher-fidelity route.

section.title: How to write a strong Uni-1 Max prompt
section.intro: Start from a selected creative direction and specify the final still, source constraints and reference roles.
section.tip: Tip: for product or typography work, write exact hierarchy and inspect the image before publishing.
section.referencesTitle: How Luma Uni-1 Max uses references

globalPrinciples: Use Max when detail and finish matter.
Separate source preservation from revision instructions.
Give every reference a specific role.
engineWhy: Higher-fidelity stills benefit from precise constraints.
Reference roles reduce ambiguity in product and campaign work.
Checking text and small details keeps claims conservative.

imageExamples.title: Luma Uni-1 Max image prompt examples
imageExamples.intro: Use these for campaign stills, typography posters, reference edits and 2K-to-4K finals.

items.title: Campaign still
items.prompt: 2K campaign still for an amber perfume bottle on white acrylic, soft studio key light, clean shadow, exact headline "AURA NOIRE" top-left, small logo lockup bottom edge.

items.title: Typography poster
items.prompt: Vertical 4K poster, premium editorial grid, graphite background, exact headline "MIDNIGHT LAUNCH", subhead "LIMITED DROP", crisp hierarchy, generous margins, readable text.

items.title: Reference edit
items.prompt: Using this product reference, keep the shape, logo and proportions. Change the scene to a midnight-blue studio, improve reflections, remove dust and fingerprints.

items.title: 2K to 4K final
items.prompt: Rerun the approved 2K composition as a 4K final. Sharpen fine details, keep typography identical, preserve brand colors, product position and the locked framing.
